fixed.title: Envelope unwrap, NotificationCommandPayload validation, recipient user_id resolution, canonical queue spec (contracts wave)
Single APP-scoped AsyncSession shared across tasks -> per-operation sessions via async_sessionmaker; transaction() for atomic units

Outbox schema redesign: trigger_event/recipient_email/last_error columns, status CHECK, processing index, max_retries=10, drop dead routing_rules/event_type; atomic processed_events claim + outbox insert (fixes non-atomic is_processed duplicate fan-out); processed_events TTL

Command path: trigger_event from payload (not DOMAIN_EVENT_TO_TRIGGER lookup); UsersClient GET /api/users/id/{user_id} with 404-vs-transport distinction (transport -> retry, not ack); explicit no_contacts outcome; routing-rules dead code deleted; get_contacts_by_email removed

Consumer: FastStream-valid handler via Context (verified with TestRabbitBroker), explicit ack policy (poison -> DLQ, transient -> backoff + NACK requeue), prefetch QoS, idempotent DLX/DLQ declaration per CONTRACT_DECISIONS, ce-bookingid/payload booking_id fallback

Channels: UniSender template UUIDs from UNISENDER_TEMPLATE_IDS config, flat scalar global_substitutions, API key only in X-API-KEY header; Telegram Russian text moved to Jinja2 templates/ (no raw trigger leaked to users); 4xx-permanent vs 408/429/5xx/transport-transient classification in all channels
Delivery results: DeliveryResultPublisher POSTs notification.*.message_sent binary CloudEvents to event-receiver (deterministic UUIDv5 ids, fire-and-forget, optional EVENTS_ENDPOINT_URL)

Outbox sender: 'processing' reaper (crash recovery), permanent/transient retry split, capped exponential backoff (10s doubling, 30min cap, budget ~hours), idle-poll backoff to 30s, result-event publishing on success

Boot: httpx.Timeout pool kwarg (DI crash) with container-resolution regression test; broker graceful_timeout; deep /health (consumer/sender/DB, 503 when degraded); hourly processed_events cleanup loop; .env.example rewritten (asyncpg DSN, no phantom queue)
Per-recipient time localization: start_time_local/end_time_local/time_zone from normalized.participants[].time_zone (notifier-side part of the flow-e2e localization finding)
Docs rewrite: AUDIT.md audit-v2 ledger, SERVICE_OVERVIEW/API_CONTRACTS/DEPENDENCIES/CLAUDE.md accurate; stale NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_ARCHITECTURE.md deleted

skipped.title: Locale/language localization (flow-e2e, part of the localization finding)
skipped.reason: Cross-service: cal.com language.locale is dropped at event-receiver ingress and the envelope/NormalizedParticipant carry no locale field. Requires event-schemas + event-receiver changes (other repos, out of scope). Time-zone half fixed in c276ebf.

skipped.title: PushChannel registration
skipped.reason: Implemented and aligned with the retryable-classification contract, but deliberately not wired in ioc.py: FCM credentials and an OAuth access-token provider do not exist yet.

notes: Predecessor's large uncommitted redesign reviewed, finished (3 result-publisher tests were constructed without endpoint_url and silently no-oped; fixed) and committed in 10 atomic chunks (0b534ae..ce3ed85 on top of 7a45e38). 80 tests pass, ruff check/format clean. Alembic migration 002 verified consistent with db/models.py. QUEUES/EVENTS digests do not exist in this repo (canonical topology lives in event_schemas.queues, documented in docs/API_CONTRACTS.md).
